_comment: Rename OSM streets/places for the game. Key = real OSM name, value = in-game name. Keys starting with '_' are ignored, and entries whose value equals the key (or is empty) keep the real name. Edit freely; rerun `npm run map:build` to apply.
_keepers: These stay real on purpose - they are Joburg icons:
_parody_placeholders: Placeholder parody names below - owner to edit/curate:
_cbd_parody: CBD grid parody names - these streets surround the player spawn:
_district_renames: Game-facing district identities (Marshalltown is the CBD core, Sandown is Sandton CBD):
